message: Support unsigned integer indexing in TQL (#6064)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+---
+title: Unsigned integer indexing in TQL
+type: bugfix
+authors:
+  - mavam
+  - codex
+created: 2026-04-22T15:03:27.225491Z
+---
+
+Both list and record indexing in TQL now work with signed and unsigned integer indices.
+This also applies to record field-position indexing and to the `get` function for records and lists.

@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+let $xs = [1, 2, 3]
+let $r = {a: "zero", b: "one"}
+let $i = 1.uint()
+
+from (
+  {case: "zero", i: 0.uint(), xs: ["a", "b"], rec: {a: 10, b: 20}},
+  {case: "one", i: 1.uint(), xs: ["a", "b"], rec: {a: 10, b: 20}},
+  {case: "out-of-bounds", i: 2.uint(), xs: ["a", "b"], rec: {a: 10, b: 20}},
+)
+select \
+  case,
+  list_const = $xs[$i],
+  record_const = $r[$i],
+  list_dynamic = xs[i]?,
+  record_dynamic = rec[i]?,
+  list_get = xs.get(i, "fallback"),
+  record_get = rec.get(i, -1),
+  list_oob = $xs[99.uint()],
+  record_oob = $r[99.uint()]

@@ -0,0 +1,48 @@
+{
+  case: "zero",
+  list_const: 2,
+  record_const: "one",
+  list_dynamic: "a",
+  record_dynamic: 10,
+  list_get: "a",
+  record_get: 10,
+  list_oob: null,
+  record_oob: null,
+}
+{
+  case: "one",
+  list_const: 2,
+  record_const: "one",
+  list_dynamic: "b",
+  record_dynamic: 20,
+  list_get: "b",
+  record_get: 20,
+  list_oob: null,
+  record_oob: null,
+}
+{
+  case: "out-of-bounds",
+  list_const: 2,
+  record_const: "one",
+  list_dynamic: null,
+  record_dynamic: null,
+  list_get: "fallback",
+  record_get: -1,
+  list_oob: null,
+  record_oob: null,
+}
+warning: list index out of bounds
+  --> tests/operators/select/unsigned_indexing.tql:18:18
+   |
+18 |   list_oob = $xs[99.uint()],
+   |                  ~~~~~~~~~ is out of bounds
+   |
+   = hint: use `[…]?` to suppress this warning
+
+warning: index out of bounds
+  --> tests/operators/select/unsigned_indexing.tql:19:19
+   |
+19 |   record_oob = $r[99.uint()]
+   |                   ~~~~~~~~~ is out of bounds
+   |
+   = hint: use `[…]?` to suppress this warning
